34:
But remember this, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>lass<Else/>son</If>: celebrated as ye are, it takes a lifetime to master our art. I recall 'avin' said somethin' to this effect when ye first came to us. What were me words again? A soup in a twelve-course dinner? Bah, I forget. The point is, I wants ye to keep workin' at yer cookin'.
An' most important of all, never forget yer passion.
